text: WATCH: Qatar’s Al Jazeera shows, for the first time, the moment Iranian missiles struck Ras Laffan Industrial City, Qatar’s gas hub. The attacks caused major direct damage to critical infrastructure and had global repercussions.
text_zh: 观看：卡塔尔半岛电视台首次展示了伊朗导弹袭击卡塔尔天然气枢纽——拉斯拉凡工业城的瞬间。此次袭击对关键基础设施造成了重大直接破坏，并产生了全球性影响。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 Al Jazeera released the moment an Iranian missiles hit Qatar’s Ras Laffan LNG site.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 半岛电视台发布了伊朗导弹击中卡塔尔拉斯拉凡液化天然气基地的瞬间。

text: 🇺🇸 Donald Trump endorses Lindsey "Gay For War" Graham. For MAGA, this of course, must be some sort of 7D "keep your friends close, but your enemies closer" Chess Move. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普支持林赛·“为战争而同性恋”·格雷厄姆。对于MAGA（让美国再次伟大）支持者来说，这当然必须是某种7D“亲近朋友，但更要亲近敌人”的国际象棋走法。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Negotiation delegations in Pakistan:
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 巴基斯坦的谈判代表团：

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Lebanon’s presidency announced that the U.S. administration has tasked the State Department with mediating between Lebanon and Israel, following a diplomatic initiative by Lebanese President Joseph Aoun. A phone call took place between the Lebanese and Israeli ambassadors in Washington, with the U.S. ambassador to Lebanon participating. The parties agreed to hold a first meeting on Tuesday at the State Department to discuss a ceasefire announcement and the start of negotiations under US auspices. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统府宣布，在美国总统约瑟夫·奥恩的外交倡议下，美国政府已指派国务院在黎巴嫩和以色列之间进行调解。黎巴嫩和以色列驻华盛顿大使进行了通话，美国驻黎巴嫩大使也参与其中。双方同意于周二在国务院举行首次会议，讨论停火声明并开始在美国主持下的谈判。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Trump: Senator Lindsey Graham is doing a fantastic job. He is running against a LUNATIC named Mark Lynch, who supports perhaps the Worst Congressman in the History of our Country, Thomas Massie, of the Great Commonwealth of Kentucky. I don’t have to go into great detail, but needless to say, Mark Lynch would be a DISASTER for the Republican Party, and Lindsey Graham just, GETS THE JOB DONE. VOTE FOR LINDSEY ALL THE WAY. MAGA! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：特朗普：参议员林赛·格雷厄姆做得非常出色。他正在与一个名叫马克·林奇的疯子竞选，此人支持我们国家历史上最糟糕的国会议员——来自肯塔基州伟大联邦的托马斯·马西。我不需要详述，但不用说，马克·林奇对共和党来说将是一场灾难，而林赛·格雷厄姆就是能把事情办成。全力投票给林赛。MAGA！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统推文

text: WarMonitor There’s a civil war brewing inside MAGA, with some even calling to jail fellow influencers for opposing Trump. Many “turning” personalities knew all along who he was and are now just trying to jump ship, as Americans increasingly turn against his rhetoric. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042694125896474755/video/1 tweet

text: Michael A. Horowitz #BREAKING : Iran's negotiation delegation, led by Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, has arrived in Islamabad according to #Iran Mehr News Foreign Minister Seyyed Abbas Araqchi, Secretary of the Defense Council Ali Akbar Ahmadian, Central Bank Governor Abdolnaser Hemmati, and some members of parliament are accompanying Mr. Qalibaf on this trip. tweet

text: 🇺🇸 Trump has repeatedly promised mass pardons to White House staff, telling aides he'll pardon "everyone who has come within 200 feet of the Oval" before he leaves office. He has issued 1,600 pardons this term, including to allies, donors, and a Honduran president convicted of cocaine trafficking. In his first term he issued fewer than 250. Trump has discussed hosting a news conference to announce mass pardons before leaving office. Aides say he raises it so often they now laugh about it. Source: WSJ. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普一再承诺对白宫工作人员进行大规模赦免，告诉助手他将在离任前赦免“所有进入椭圆形办公室200英尺范围内的人”。他在本届任期内已经发布了1,600项赦免，包括盟友、捐赠者和一名因贩毒被定罪的洪都拉斯总统。他在第一任期内发布的赦免不到250项。特朗普讨论过在离任前举行新闻发布会宣布大规模赦免。助手们说他提得太频繁，以至于现在都拿它开玩笑了。来源：华尔街日报。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian delegation led by the country's parliament speaker has arrived in Pakistan for talks with the US.

text: Trump: Senator Lindsey Graham is doing a fantastic job. VOTE FOR LINDSEY ALL THE WAY. MAGA!

text: Iranian officials land at Nur Khan Airbase in Islamabad under Pakistan Air Force fighter jet escort ahead of peace talks.
text_zh: 伊朗官员在巴基斯坦空军战斗机护送下抵达伊斯兰堡努尔汗空军基地，准备进行和平谈判。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Axios: U.S. Vice President Vance is set to lead high-stakes negotiations with Iran in Islamabad, signalling a shift toward more direct, high-level diplomacy after earlier efforts repeatedly collapsed. Vance was brought in after Iranian officials told the U.S. they believed U.S. Special Envoy Witkoff and Jared Kushner would deceive them. For Vance these negotiations are a big deal, with a U.S. describing as like the Super Bowl to him. The meeting would be the first high level meeting between the two countries since 1979. However, chances for success seem low with one U.S. official commenting that the two sides don’t agree on what they’re negotiating. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Axios：美国副总统万斯将率领高风险谈判团队在伊斯兰堡与伊朗进行会谈，这标志着在早先的努力多次失败后，美国转向更直接、更高级别的外交。万斯是在伊朗官员告诉美国他们认为美国特使威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳会欺骗他们之后被引入的。对于万斯来说，这些谈判是一件大事，美国方面形容这对他来说就像超级碗。这将是自1979年以来两国之间的首次高级别会议。然而，成功的机会似乎很低，一位美国官员评论说，双方甚至在谈判内容上都无法达成一致。 @wfwitness

text: WATCH: Destruction at Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar following Iranian strikes.
text_zh: 观看：伊朗袭击后卡塔尔乌代德空军基地的破坏情况。

text: Trump has repeatedly suggested—sometimes jokingly—that he might issue sweeping pardons to aides before leaving office. In one meeting he said, “I’ll pardon everyone who has come within 200 feet of the Oval,” later shrinking the joke to “10 feet.” Source: WSJ
text_zh: 特朗普一再暗示——有时是开玩笑——他可能会在离任前对助手进行大规模赦免。在一次会议上，他说：“我会赦免所有进入椭圆形办公室200英尺范围内的人”，后来将这个玩笑缩小为“10英尺”。来源：华尔街日报

text: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli airstrike targets a Civil Defense team from the Health Authority in Deir Kifa, southern Lebanon, several injuries reported. Striking emergency responders is a war crime under international humanitarian law. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部代尔基法卫生局的一支民防队，据报道有多人受伤。根据国际人道法，袭击急救人员是战争罪。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 Israeli media: Ten rockets were launched from Lebanon towards Keriat Shmona, northern occupied territories.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列媒体：十枚火箭弹从黎巴嫩发射，目标是被占领土北部的基里亚特什莫纳。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike has targeted a Civil Defense team from the Health Authority in the town of Deir Kifa , in southern Lebanon resulting in several injuries. @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇧🇯 🇫🇷 Le Monde : French special forces are secretly conducting combat operations alongside the Beninese army in northern Benin against the growing jihadist threat. Officialy deployed as instructors, the SOF operators are used as a quick reaction force as the African country faces pressure from jihadist groups coming from Burkina Faso and Niger. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇧🇯 🇫🇷 世界报：法国特种部队正在贝宁北部秘密与贝宁军队并肩作战，打击日益严重的圣战威胁。这些特种作战人员名义上是作为教官部署的，但实际上被用作快速反应部队，因为该非洲国家正面临来自布基纳法索和尼日尔的圣战组织的压力。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has announced for the third time today that they targeted a gathering of soldiers and their vehicles in the vicinity of Al-Ishraq School in the city of Bint Jbeil with a rocket barrage. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党今天第三次宣布，他们用火箭弹袭击了宾特朱拜勒市Al-Ishraq学校附近的士兵及其车辆集结地。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israeli drone activity over Beirut and its suburbs. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli drones have been operating over Beirut and its suburbs for over 3 hours at a very low altitude. @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "IDF soldiers — the soldiers of the most moral army in the world," 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“以色列国防军士兵——世界上最道德军队的士兵，” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇱❌🇪🇸 Israel announced on Friday that it has expelled Spain from the United States’ Civil-Military Coordination Center (CMCC) in Kiryat Gat, a body established to oversee humanitarian and logistical operations related to Gaza. According to a statement from…" 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 Netanyahu said that countries that “wage a diplomatic war” against Israel will pay “an immediate price.” Israel will not remain silent in the face of those who attack us. Spain has defamed our heroes, IDF soldiers — the soldiers of the most moral army in the world, Those who attack Israel instead of terrorist regimes — whoever does so — will not be our partner regarding the future of the region. I am not prepared to tolerate this hypocrisy and this hostility. I do not intend to allow any country to wage a diplomatic war against us without paying an immediate price. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇱❌🇪🇸 以色列周五宣布，已将西班牙从美国设在基里亚特加特的民事-军事协调中心（CMCC）中驱逐，该机构旨在监督与加沙有关的人道主义和后勤行动。根据一份声明……” 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 内塔尼亚胡表示，对以色列“发动外交战争”的国家将付出“即时代价”。面对攻击我们的人，以色列不会保持沉默。西班牙诽谤了我们的英雄，以色列国防军士兵——世界上最道德军队的士兵。那些攻击以色列而不是恐怖政权的人——无论谁这样做——都不会成为我们未来地区事务的伙伴。我不会容忍这种虚伪和敌意。我不打算允许任何国家在不付出即时代价的情况下对我们发动外交战争。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇪🇸 In a post on X, Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said Netanyahu’s “contempt for life and international law is intolerable” in light of the attacks. “It’s time to speak clearly: – Lebanon must be included in the ceasefire. – The international community must…" 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 Israel announced on Friday that it has expelled Spain from the United States’ Civil-Military Coordination Center (CMCC) in Kiryat Gat, a body established to oversee humanitarian and logistical operations related to Gaza. According to a statement from the Israeli Foreign Ministry, the move was carried out in coordination with the United States, and Spain has been formally notified of the decision. The CMCC was set up to monitor the ceasefire but is heavily slanted to protecting Israeli interests in the ceasefire agreement. It was joined by at least 14 countries and dozens of international organizations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇪🇸 在X上的一篇帖子中，首相佩德罗·桑切斯表示，鉴于这些袭击，内塔尼亚胡对生命和国际法的“蔑视是不可容忍的”。“是时候明确表态了：——黎巴嫩必须被纳入停火协议。——国际社会必须……” 🇮🇱 ❌ 🇪🇸 以色列周五宣布，已将西班牙从美国设在基里亚特加特的民事-军事协调中心（CMCC）中驱逐，该机构旨在监督与加沙有关的人道主义和后勤行动。根据以色列外交部的声明，此举是与美国协调进行的，西班牙已正式收到该决定。CMCC旨在监督停火，但严重偏向于保护停火协议中的以色列利益。至少有14个国家和数十个国际组织加入了该中心。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 📸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 - The Pakistan Air Force ( #PAF ) escorted Iranian delegation planes as soon as they entered Pakistani airspace. The PAF 317 callsign belongs to a Saab 2000 EW aircraft most likely flying along fighter jets.
text_zh: 📸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 - 巴基斯坦空军（#PAF）在伊朗代表团飞机进入巴基斯坦领空后立即对其进行了护送。PAF 317呼号属于一架萨博2000预警机，很可能与战斗机一起飞行。

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 The Iranian delegation has entered Pakistani airspace. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗代表团已进入巴基斯坦领空。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Iranian delegation has entered Pakistani airspace
text_zh: 伊朗代表团已进入巴基斯坦领空

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区及基里亚特什莫纳周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Kan : Hamas has told the Trump administration’s Board of Peace that it will not disarm without a “comprehensive solution” including a full Israeli withdrawal from Gaza and an end to the blockade. An internal Hamas document obtained by Kan states that the group views its weapons as legitimate defence as long as the "occupation continues." Hamas refuses to link reconstruction to disarmament, calling the proposal “unrealistic”. It insists that security mechanisms remain in place to prevent a vacuum. Israel assesses the response will be rejected and is preparing operational plans to resume fighting in Gaza. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Kan：哈马斯告诉特朗普政府的和平委员会，除非达成包括以色列完全撤出加沙和结束封锁在内的“全面解决方案”，否则它不会解除武装。Kan获得的一份哈马斯内部文件显示，只要“占领继续”，该组织就将其武器视为合法防御。哈马斯拒绝将重建与解除武装挂钩，称该提议“不现实”。它坚持要求保留安全机制以防止出现权力真空。以色列评估认为该回应将被拒绝，并正在制定恢复加沙战斗的作战计划。 @wfwitness
